title: The Last Adventure
writer: Robert Enrico, José Giovanni, Pierre Pelegri
actors: Alain Delon, Lino Ventura, Joanna Shimkus
plot: Best friends become aware of a crashed plane lying on the bottom of the ocean, allegedly stuffed with wealth. Adventurers set off in search of prey. And along with them, Letizia is linked, with whom both friends are secretly in love.
